reactivation_templates.funding: Just saw {{company}} raised a round - congrats! With fresh momentum, this might be a good time to revisit the creator partnership we discussed. Brands often see 3-5x ROI on YouTube campaigns right after fundraising announcements.
reactivation_templates.new_hire: Noticed {{company}} brought on a new {{role}} - exciting times! Sometimes fresh leadership means fresh marketing approaches. Happy to share what's working for brands like yours on YouTube.
reactivation_templates.product_launch: Saw {{company}} just launched {{event}}! New products are perfect for creator content - audiences love seeing authentic reactions. Want to explore a campaign?
reactivation_templates.expansion: Congrats on {{event}}! Growth mode is the perfect time for creator partnerships. Let me know if you want to chat about reaching new audiences.
reactivation_templates.partnership: Saw {{company}} partnered with {{event}} - nice move! If you're looking to amplify that news, my audience would be a great fit.
reactivation_templates.default: Hope you've been well! Wanted to circle back - {{event}}. Seemed like a good time to reconnect about potential creator partnerships.
